name: Pinnacle Investment Management Group Limited
analysis: PNI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 31% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$16.9400, stop A$14.7906, target A$23.3882 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
